use_cases: Displaying frequently asked questions on support or help pages
Providing onboarding information with expandable answers
Creating interactive FAQ sections for product documentation
Building knowledge base components with animated reveals
ai_summary: An animated FAQ accordion component that displays expandable question-and-answer pairs with smooth scroll-triggered animations. Built with Framer Motion for fluid reveal transitions and uses a clean, minimal design with an accent-colored icon header and collapsible card-based items. Fully customizable with TypeScript support.
